en.name: Paper.io
en.desc: Capture territory by enclosing areas with your trail!
en.description: Paper.io is a territory capture game where you move your character around a grid to create trails. When you return to your territory, the enclosed area becomes yours. Watch out for other players who can cut your trail - if you hit your trail or an enemy trail, game over! Features AI opponents that compete for territory.
en.objectives: Capture as much territory as possible. Return to your territory to enclose captured areas. Avoid hitting your own trail or enemy trails. Eliminate AI opponents by cutting their trails.
en.howToPlay: Use arrow keys or WASD to move your character. Move outside your territory to create a trail. Return to your territory to enclose the captured area. Don't hit your own trail or game over! Cut enemy trails to eliminate them.

rules.controls: Use arrow keys or WASD to move. Your character moves in four directions on the grid.
mechanics: You must be in your territory to create a trail
Enclosed areas are filled when you return to territory
Hitting any trail (yours or enemy) ends the game
Captured territory from eliminated players transfers to you

tips: Start by expanding in safe directions near your territory
Don't make your trail too long - return frequently
Watch for AI players and cut their trails when they extend
Claim neutral territory between you and your base

faq.question: How do I capture territory?
faq.answer: Move outside your territory, create a trail, then return to your territory to enclose the area.

faq.question: What happens if I hit my trail?
faq.answer: Game over. Be careful not to cross your own trail or hit enemy trails.

faq.question: Can I eliminate AI opponents?
faq.answer: Yes! Cross their trail to eliminate them, and their territory becomes yours.

zh.name: 圈地大作战
zh.desc: 用你的轨迹包围区域来占领领土！
zh.description: Paper.io是一款领土占领游戏，在网格上移动角色创建轨迹。当返回自己的领土时，包围的区域成为你的。注意其他玩家可以切断你的轨迹 - 如果撞到自己的轨迹或敌人轨迹，游戏结束！游戏包含与AI对手争夺领土。
zh.objectives: 占领尽可能多的领土。返回自己的领土来包围捕获区域.避免撞到自己的轨迹或敌人轨迹.通过切断敌人轨迹来消灭AI对手.
zh.howToPlay: 使用方向键或WASD移动角色.移动到领土外创建轨迹.返回领土包围捕获区域.不要撞到自己的轨迹否则游戏结束！切断敌人轨迹消灭他们.

rules.controls: 使用方向键或WASD移动。你的角色在网格上向四个方向移动。
mechanics: 必须在领土内才能留下轨迹
返回领土时包围区域被填充
撞到任何轨迹（自己的或敌人的）游戏结束
被消灭玩家的领土转移给消灭者

tips: 从靠近领土的安全方向开始扩展
不要让轨迹太长 -经常返回
观察AI玩家，在他们延伸时切断他们的轨迹
在你的基地之间占领中立领土

faq.question: 如何占领领土？
faq.answer: 移动到领土外创建轨迹，然后返回领土包围区域。

faq.question: 撞到轨迹会怎样？
faq.answer: 游戏结束。小心不要穿过自己的轨迹或撞到敌人轨迹。

faq.question: 可以消灭AI对手吗？
faq.answer: 可以！穿过他们的轨迹消灭他们，他们的领土会归你所有。
